opcodes.name: ADD
opcodes.title: Add
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the + or += operator)

opcodes.name: ADDDUR
opcodes.title: Add Duration
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the + or += operators with duration functions such as %YEARS and %MONTHS )

opcodes.name: ALLOC
opcodes.title: Allocate Storage
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %ALLOC built-in function)

opcodes.name: ANDxx
opcodes.title: And
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the AND operator)

opcodes.name: BITOFF
opcodes.title: Set Bits Off
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITAND and %BITNOT built-in functions. See Figure 3 .)

opcodes.name: BITON
opcodes.title: Set Bits On
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITOR built-in function. See Figure 3 .)

opcodes.name: CABxx
opcodes.title: Compare and Branch
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use other operation codes, such as LEAVE , ITER , and RETURN )

opcodes.name: CALL
opcodes.title: Call a Program
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the CALLP operation code)

opcodes.name: CALLB
opcodes.title: Call a Bound Procedure
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the CALLP operation code)

opcodes.name: CALLP
opcodes.title: Call a Prototyped Procedure or Program
opcodes.freeFormNote: {CALLP{(EMR)}} name ( { parm1 {: parm2 ...}} )

opcodes.name: CASxx
opcodes.title: Conditionally Invoke Subroutine
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the IF and EXSR operation codes)

opcodes.name: CAT
opcodes.title: Concatenate Two Strings
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the + operator)

opcodes.name: CHECK
opcodes.title: Check Characters
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %CHECK built-in function)

opcodes.name: CHECKR
opcodes.title: Check Reverse
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %CHECKR built-in function)

opcodes.name: COMP
opcodes.title: Compare
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the use the = , < , <= , > , >= , or <> operators)

opcodes.name: DATA-GEN
opcodes.title: Generate a Document from a Variable

opcodes.name: DATA-INTO
opcodes.title: Parse a Document into a Variable
opcodes.freeForm: DATA-INTO{(EH)} receiver %DATA( document {: options1 }) %PARSER( parser {: options2 });

opcodes.name: DEFINE
opcodes.title: Field Definition
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the LIKE or DTAARA keyword on the Definition specification)

opcodes.name: DIV
opcodes.title: Divide
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the / or /= operator, or the %DIV built-in function)

opcodes.name: DO
opcodes.title: Do
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the FOR operation code)

opcodes.name: DOUxx
opcodes.title: Do Until
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the DOU operation code)

opcodes.name: DOWxx
opcodes.title: Do While
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the DOW operation code)

opcodes.name: ENDyy
opcodes.title: End a Structured Group
opcodes.freeFormNote: ENDDO ENDFOR ENDIF ENDMON ENDSL (END and ENDCS not allowed)

opcodes.name: EVAL
opcodes.title: Evaluate expression
opcodes.freeFormNote: {EVAL{(HMR)}} result = expression

opcodes.name: EXTRCT
opcodes.title: Extract Date/Time/Timestamp
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %SUBDT built-in function)

values: index-name = start-value BY increment TO | DOWNTO limit

opcodes.name: FORCE
opcodes.title: Force a Certain File to Be Read Next Cycle

opcodes.name: GOTO
opcodes.title: Go To
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use other operation codes, such as LEAVE , LEAVESR , ITER , and RETURN )

opcodes.name: IFxx
opcodes.title: If
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the IF operation code)

opcodes.name: KFLD
opcodes.title: Define Parts of a Key
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use %KDS )

opcodes.name: KLIST
opcodes.title: Define a Composite Key
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use %KDS )

opcodes.name: LOOKUP
opcodes.title: Look Up a Table or Array Element
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %LOOKUP or %TLOOKUP built-in function)

opcodes.name: MHHZO
opcodes.title: Move High to High Zone
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITAND and %BITOR built-in functions. See Figure 4 .)

opcodes.name: MHLZO
opcodes.title: Move High to Low Zone
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITAND and %BITOR built-in functions. See Figure 4 .)

opcodes.name: MLHZO
opcodes.title: Move Low to High Zone
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITAND and %BITOR built-in functions. See Figure 4 .)

opcodes.name: MLLZO
opcodes.title: Move Low to Low Zone
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITAND and %BITOR built-in functions. See Figure 4 .)

opcodes.name: MOVE
opcodes.title: Move
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the EVAL or EVALR operations, or built-in functions such as %CHAR , %DATE , %DEC , %DECH , %GRAPH , %INT , %INTH , %TIME , %TIMESTAMP , %UCS2 , %UNS , or %UNSH )

opcodes.name: MOVEA
opcodes.title: Move Array
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed — use %SUBARR or one or more String Operations )

opcodes.name: MOVEL
opcodes.title: Move Left
opcodes.freeFormNote: not allowed - use EVAL , or built-in functions such as %CHAR , %DATE , %DEC , %DECH , %GRAPH , %INT , %INTH , %TIME , %TIMESTAMP , %UCS2 , %UNS , or %UNSH

opcodes.name: MULT
opcodes.title: Multiply
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the * or *= operator)

opcodes.name: MVR
opcodes.title: Move Remainder
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %REM built-in function)

opcodes.name: OCCUR
opcodes.title: Set/Get Occurrence of a Data Structure
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %OCCUR built-in function)

opcodes.name: ORxx
opcodes.title: Or
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the OR operator)

opcodes.name: PARM
opcodes.title: Identify Parameters
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use Prototypes and Parameters and CALLP )

opcodes.name: PLIST
opcodes.title: Identify a Parameter List
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use Prototypes and Parameters and CALLP )

opcodes.name: REALLOC
opcodes.title: Reallocate Storage with New Length
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %REALLOC built-in function)

opcodes.name: SCAN
opcodes.title: Scan String
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %SCAN built-in function)

opcodes.name: SETOFF
opcodes.title: Set Indicator Off
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use EVAL *INxx = *OFF )

opcodes.name: SETON
opcodes.title: Set Indicator On
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use EVAL *INxx = *ON )

opcodes.name: SHTDN
opcodes.title: Shut Down
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %SHUT built-in function)

opcodes.name: SND-MSG
opcodes.title: Send a Message to the Joblog

opcodes.name: SQRT
opcodes.title: Square Root
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %SQRT built-in function)

opcodes.name: SUB
opcodes.title: Subtract
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the - or -= operators)

opcodes.name: SUBDUR
opcodes.title: Subtract Duration
opcodes.freeFormNote: not allowed - use the - or -= operators with duration functions such as %YEARS and %MONTHS , or the %DIFF built-in function)

opcodes.name: SUBST
opcodes.title: Substring
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use %SUBST )

opcodes.name: TAG
opcodes.title: Tag
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use other operation codes, such as LEAVE , ITER , and RETURN )

opcodes.name: TESTB
opcodes.title: Test Bit
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITAND built-in function. See Figure 2 .)

opcodes.name: TESTN
opcodes.title: Test Numeric
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - rather than testing the variable before using it, code the usage of the variable in a MONITOR group and handle any errors with ON-ERROR. See Error-Handling Operations .)

opcodes.name: TESTZ
opcodes.title: Test Zone
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %BITAND built-in function with X'F0' to isolate the zone part of the character)

opcodes.name: TIME
opcodes.title: Retrieve Time and Date
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed – use the %DATE , %TIME , and %TIMESTAMP built-in functions)

opcodes.name: UNLOCK
opcodes.title: Unlock a Data Area or Release a Record

opcodes.name: WHEN-IN
opcodes.title: When the SELECT Operand is IN the WHEN-IN Operand

opcodes.name: WHEN-IS
opcodes.title: When the SELECT Operand is Equal to the WHEN-IS Operand

opcodes.name: WHENxx
opcodes.title: When True Then Select
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the WHEN , WHEN-IN or WHEN-IS operation code)

opcodes.name: XFOOT
opcodes.title: Summing the Elements of an Array
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %XFOOT built-in function)

opcodes.name: XLATE
opcodes.title: Translate
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the %XLATE built-in function)

opcodes.name: XML-INTO
opcodes.title: Parse an XML Document into a Variable

opcodes.name: Z-ADD
opcodes.title: Zero and Add
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the EVAL operation code)

opcodes.name: Z-SUB
opcodes.title: Zero and Subtract
opcodes.freeFormNote: (not allowed - use the EVAL operation code)

bifs.name: %DECH
bifs.title: Convert to Packed Decimal Format with Half Adjust

bifs.name: %DIFF
bifs.title: Difference Between Two Date, Time, or Timestamp Values

bifs.name: %EOF
bifs.title: Return End or Beginning of File Condition

bifs.name: %INTH
bifs.title: Convert to Integer Format with Half Adjust

bifs.name: %OCCUR
bifs.title: Set/Get Occurrence of a Data Structure

bifs.name: %REPLACE
bifs.title: Replace Character String
bifs.freeForm: %REPLACE(replacement string: source string{:start position {:source length to replace { : *NATURAL | *STDCHARSIZE}}})

bifs.name: %SCAN
bifs.title: Scan for Characters
bifs.freeForm: %SCAN(search argument : source string {: start position {: length {: *NATURAL | *STDCHARSIZE}}})

bifs.name: %SCANR
bifs.title: Scan Reverse for Characters
bifs.freeForm: %SCANR(search argument : source string {: start position {: length {: *NATURAL | *STDCHARSIZE}}})

bifs.name: %SCANRPL
bifs.title: Scan and Replace Characters
bifs.freeForm: %SCANRPL(scan string : replacement : source { : scan start { : scan length { : *NATURAL | *STDCHARSIZE} } })

bifs.name: %SUBDT
bifs.title: Extract a Portion of a Date, Time, or Timestamp

bifs.name: %THIS
bifs.title: Return Class Instance for Native Method

bifs.name: %UNSH
bifs.title: Convert to Unsigned Format with Half Adjust
